xpath.attribute: {'list_view_ref': 'mrp_subcontracting.mrp_subcontracting_view_stock_move_line_operation_tree', 'default_product_uom_id': product_uom, 'default_picking_id': picking_id, 'default_move_id': id, 'default_product_id': product_id, 'default_location_id': location_id, 'default_location_dest_id': location_dest_id, 'default_company_id': company_id}
